news.t: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies

overview.description: The Gabelli High Income ETF (GBHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund is an actively managed high yield corporate bond ETF that aims to deliver high total returns while focusing on capital preservation. The fund uses proprietary fundamental analysis to select securities of any maturity. GBHI was launched on Nov 17, 2025 and is issued by GAMCO Investors.

data.title: Gabelli Funds Now Offers Seven Fully Transparent ETF Strategies
data.text: GREENWICH, Conn., Dec. 17, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Gabelli Funds, LLC (“Gabelli”) today announced that all its actively managed ETFs are now fully transparent. These Gabelli ETFs complement the firm'...
